name: Spaghetti Squash and Chicken Skillet Casserol
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless chicken breasts, cooked and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms and the next four ingredients. Cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes or until tender.
3. Add spaghetti squash and the next six ingredients. Cook for 4 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in sour cream and cook, stirring constantly, just until thoroughly heated. Remove from heat.
5. Sprinkle with cheese. Cover and let stand for 1 minute.
6. To bake, prepare the mixture according to directions and spoon into a lightly greased 1.5-quart casserole dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes.
